Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

Interface FlixelSoundBackend

public interface FlixelSoundBackend
Platform-agnostic abstraction over a single sound instance.

On JVM platforms the default implementation wraps MiniAudio (MASound); on TeaVM/web the implementation falls back to libGDX Gdx.audio.

Obtain instances through FlixelSoundBackend.Factory.createSound(java.lang.String, short, java.lang.Object, boolean).

See Also:
  • FlixelSoundBackend.Factory

    An opaque handle to an audio-graph effect node (reverb, delay, low-pass, etc.).
    static interface 
    FlixelSoundBackend.Factory
    Platform-specific factory for creating sounds, groups, and effect nodes.

  • Method Details

    • play

      void play()
      Starts or resumes playback.

    • pause

      void pause()
      Pauses playback at the current cursor position.

    • stop

      void stop()
      Stops playback and resets the cursor to the beginning.

    • isPlaying

      boolean isPlaying()
      Returns whether this sound is currently playing.
      Returns:
      true if the sound is actively playing.

    • isEnd

      boolean isEnd()
      Returns whether this sound has reached its end.
      Returns:
      true if the cursor is at or past the end of the stream.

    • getVolume

      float getVolume()
      Returns the current volume.
      Returns:
      Volume level (0 = silent, 1 = default, values above 1 are allowed).

    • setVolume

      void setVolume(float volume)
      Sets the volume.
      Parameters:
      volume - Volume level (0 = silent, 1 = default).

    • setPitch

      void setPitch(float pitch)
      Sets the pitch multiplier.
      Parameters:
      pitch - Pitch multiplier. Must be greater than 0. 1 = default.

    • setPan

      void setPan(float pan)
      Sets the stereo pan.
      Parameters:
      pan - Pan value in [-1, 1]; -1 = full left, 0 = center, 1 = full right.

    • getCursorPosition

      float getCursorPosition()
      Returns the current cursor position in seconds.
      Returns:
      Playback position in seconds.

    • seekTo

      void seekTo(float seconds)
      Seeks to the given position.
      Parameters:
      seconds - Target position in seconds.

    • getLength

      float getLength()
      Returns the total length of the sound in seconds.
      Returns:
      Duration in seconds, or 0 if unknown.

    • isLooping

      boolean isLooping()
      Returns whether this sound is set to loop.
      Returns:
      true if the sound will loop when it reaches the end.

    • setLooping

      void setLooping(boolean looping)
      Enables or disables looping.
      Parameters:
      looping - true to loop, false to play once.

    • setPosition

      void setPosition(float x, float y, float z)
      Sets the 3-D position of this sound for spatial audio. Implementations that do not support spatial audio should ignore this call.
      Parameters:
      x - X position.
      y - Y position.
      z - Z position.

    • dispose

      void dispose()
      Releases native resources held by this sound.
